{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323012017C93949CE381B7B159F12"}"},"total":379},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7240881354224403234","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"支持一下，观感还行，比较平常吧，虽然没太多出彩的地方，但也没什么让我感觉比较毒的地方，算是这个流派比较正常的小说，主要写的太晚了，要是早几个月前这个流派刚出现时的话会很出彩，但现在只能说一般，毕竟话题都写烂了，剧情也基本可以看到头，无非那么几种，反正加油吧"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1685899313,"group_id":"7196676457911815180","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"愿这奔波的人生。能够多点安稳；愿这无望的追求，能够多点可能。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N53uJV3uNR9k6TowE7Q0DovO6opuSo5c5TowuxhiXi0u","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/6a8de33dd896493880b6f4144afd8b85~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776789803&x-signature=seJ%2FsSRuOWmn2ATtHjjueGochOM%3D","user_id":"1398177107032766","user_name":"云念舒"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1398177107032766","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7196676457911815180","book_info":{"abstract":"【玄幻仙侠+记忆曝光+无系统＋单女主+虐文+慢热】
友情提示：不是爽文！不是爽文！不是爽文！重要事情说三遍！
天虚宫前。
“陈尊，你弑师叛道，亲手把我困在万年冰窟受刑，今日拿命来偿！”
“魔主，你屠戮我大齐百万子民，千刀万剐，也难消心头之恨！”
“杀我父母，谋取我极阴之体做炉鼎，我与你不共戴天！”
“我青丘一族皆死在你手上，未婚夫也被你这恶魔杀死，你怎能如此残暴？！”
……
面对妹妹赵灵韵的泣血厉喝、大齐女皇的喷火的目光、爱徒叶惜玉的冰冷刺骨的言语、大泽妖王青丘雅儿的厌恶、曾经挚爱的姬燕舞面无表情的鄙视……
还有天罗大陆所有修士的幸灾乐祸、热讽冷嘲……
陈尊破残的身体剧烈的颤抖。
恍惚之间，他似乎又看到了师父慈祥的脸，就在天虚宫前，沉重地说道：“这是你的责任……”
一切的罪孽归于我一人。
陈尊苦涩笑了一下，冷漠的目光扫了他们一眼，深邃的眼眸里充满无穷无尽的疲惫。
他把目光投向远方，那个温婉的女子浮现在眼前。
“沈若烟，我这一生，对得起天下人，唯独对不起你……”
当陈尊倒下的时候，魔女沈若烟还是来迟。
然而，当水月镜重现了陈尊的记忆后，她们都后悔了……","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o4238b07a738fc48eb6cb50b01ced6c35~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"长风吹去","author_id":"","book_id":"7196676457911815180","book_name":"说好的要杀我，你们怎么后悔了","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#e8e8e0","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2009人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1140,"name":"东方仙侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1140&name=东方仙侠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":259,"name":"奇幻仙侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=259&name=奇幻仙侠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":9,"name":"仙侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=9&name=仙侠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":389,"name":"单女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=389&name=单女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":511,"name":"东方玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=511&name=东方玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":834,"name":"1v1","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=834&name=1v1&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":838,"name":"无后宫","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=838&name=无后宫&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7196676893314122296","read_count":"2009","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1203062"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.3","serial_count":"587","tags":"东方仙侠,奇幻仙侠,仙侠,玄幻,单女主,架空,东方玄幻,1v1,无后宫","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/e4c38e4f28c6298f396eef368f85239d~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779384018&x-signature=noo%2Fo9XL2qoPBFeKLCyjhf7433g%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2779635862","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"2.0598287e+07"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323012017C93949CE381B7B159F12"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读6小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":5,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":20598,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":7768},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_reply_time":1685980193,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7245039077547852605","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"看了一晚上 写的很好啊 比其他的回忆好多了，文笔也好但为啥看的人这么少呢，评分也好低，作者大大为爱发电啊这是，开始说人少我还没意识到，知道我翻到最后，才十一个催更。。好惨[捂脸]也不催作者大大爆更了，书别凉就行，真的写的很好，加油加油[注意]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1686867336,"group_id":"7196676457911815180","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"有幸识卿桃花面，从此阡陌多暖春","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N2sFVTlFHsTO4X23WnO8gWI=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/ca9d45b3e37242fd9d700b833c24f910~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776795536&x-signature=0xqeHABlMPkPrrA8X2RPj4SEMYg%3D","user_id":"149121486292237","user_name":"风轻⚝云淡"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"149121486292237","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1746560791,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE1DD","can_worn":false,"id":1,"name":"吃瓜群众","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/99d8abedb53eea031f973b1251119d85","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/eaf916cdd4f4860ea2a74b0d0e3718f1"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7196676457911815180","book_info":{"abstract":"【玄幻仙侠+记忆曝光+无系统＋单女主+虐文+慢热】
